Honours

Selected awards and scholarships recognising research and academic achievement.

  1. 2025

    Deep Learning Indaba poster awards

    Two awards recognising innovation and impact.

  2. 2025

    Google DeepMind Master's Scholarship

    Full scholarship for the AI for Science programme at AIMS South Africa.

  3. 2025

    Zeribe Nwosu Foundation Scholarship

    Scholarship in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science.

  4. 2023–2024

    Senator Olamilekan Yayi Undergraduate Scholarship

    Academic excellence scholarship.
